author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text:
Goal: mirror current sway+waybar workspace bar on Mac. Reference behavior in packages/linux/waybar/.config/waybar/config.jsonc — modules-center is 'sway/workspaces' with all-outputs=false (per-monitor display) and format='{name}'. Each monitor's bar shows only its own workspaces; active workspace is highlighted; non-empty workspaces visible alongside the active one.

Scope:
- New package at packages/macos/sketchybar/.config/sketchybar/ (sketchybarrc + plugins/aerospace_workspace.sh)
- Add 'sketchybar' to packages_macos in justfile and to brew install line in install-deps macOS branch (note: SketchyBar is brew install --cask sketchybar OR brew install FelixKratz/formulae/sketchybar — check which is current)
- Wire AeroSpace integration via exec-on-workspace-change in aerospace.toml to trigger sketchybar refresh
- Per-monitor display: each SketchyBar item filters its workspace list to one monitor (use 'aerospace list-workspaces --monitor N --empty no' as the data source)
- Hide macOS native menu bar (System Settings step in README §8 — manual)
- Update README §14 cheatsheet with SketchyBar info

Reference docs:
- AeroSpace SketchyBar guide: https://github.com/nikitabobko/AeroSpace/blob/main/docs/guide.adoc#sketchybar
- SketchyBar: https://github.com/FelixKratz/SketchyBar

Defer until: confirmed Mac is the daily driver. Until then the AeroSpace built-in menu bar + 'aerospace list-workspaces' CLI are sufficient.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: MVP scope + placement: per-monitor workspace pills ONLY (no clock/battery/cpu/etc. first pass). SketchyBar items go on the RIGHT side so they don't fight macOS's left-side app menu (File/Edit/View) or system-tray icons. Each monitor section shows non-empty + focused workspaces; matches waybar 'sway/workspaces' with all-outputs=false. Hidden when empty. Must survive 'aerospace reload-config' and monitor hotplug.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: Palette + fonts (default from packages/linux/waybar/.config/waybar/style.css): bg #161616, fg #bcc2cc, muted #5e6570, active #10b981 (green), warn #d19a66, crit #e06c75. Font: IBM Plex Sans 12px in waybar — Mac doesn't ship it; fall back to -apple-system, do NOT auto-install. Icons: waybar uses Font Awesome 6; on Mac prefer SF Symbols natively (built-in, no install). Be flexible — when Mac has a cleaner native path (SF Symbols, system font), prefer it and document the swap.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: Integration: aerospace.toml needs 'exec-on-workspace-change' triggering 'sketchybar --trigger aerospace_workspace_change' AND a flag to suppress AeroSpace's built-in menu bar so they don't double up. Hide macOS native menu bar via System Settings → Control Center → 'Automatically hide and show menu bar' = always (manual, document in README §8). Data source: 'aerospace list-workspaces --monitor focused --empty no' — call from a callback script, not on every refresh.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: Acceptance criteria (MVP done when all true): (1) just install-deps installs sketchybar on clean Mac; (2) just setup links sketchybar package (added to packages_macos); (3) brew services start sketchybar — bar renders with per-monitor pills on right; (4) alt-N switches workspace, focused-pill highlight follows on correct monitor; (5) alt-ctrl-N moves window, originating monitor's pill clears if workspace becomes empty; (6) AeroSpace built-in menu bar gone (no double-up); (7) Hot-unplug + replug external monitor, bar recovers; (8) os==Linux: sketchybar package not stowed (no regression). README §8 + §14 updated.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: Post-MVP followups (NOT for one-shot): port waybar's clock/battery/wifi/audio/cpu/memory/disk modules to SketchyBar; click handlers (alt-click pill = move window there); theme polish/animations; per-app icons. Debug tips: first-run kill any existing 'pkill sketchybar' and run 'sketchybar' in foreground to see stderr; 'sketchybar --query' inspects state; 'sketchybar --reload' applies config. MDM caveat: if brew install --cask sketchybar is blocked or sketchybar can't draw, that's the limit — fall back to AeroSpace's built-in bar; document in README §8 MDM fallback.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text:
Decisions locked (2026-04-27 sense-check):
- Brew install: tap-based — 'brew tap FelixKratz/formulae && brew install sketchybar'. Not a cask. Add tap+install to install-deps macOS branch, plus 'brew services start sketchybar' (idempotent).
- AeroSpace built-in menu bar: no separate flag to suppress. The menu-extra indicator disappears when the macOS menu bar is hidden (System Settings step in README §8). Acceptance #6 reads as 'menu bar hidden ⇒ no double-up'.
- Per-monitor architecture: SketchyBar has ONE bar config; per-display filtering happens via item 'display=N' property. Going with Option A — one item per (monitor × workspace), e.g. space.<monitor>.<ws>, drawing=on/off + background.color toggled by plugin on aerospace_workspace_change. ~20 workspaces × N monitors items declared upfront. Chose A over B (single summary label per monitor) because B can't style focused vs inactive pills differently — would break acceptance #4. Chose A over C (lazy --add/--remove) because lifecycle complexity isn't worth it for static workspace count.
- Monitor hotplug (acceptance #7): subscribe to SketchyBar 'display_change' event, re-run same updater script.
- Daily-driver gate: confirmed past — Mac is daily driver.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text:
Follow-up to tg-g263e (MVP — workspace pills only, completed at commit b3d8e26).

Scope: port waybar's system widgets to SketchyBar to mirror Linux bar. Reference module configs in packages/linux/waybar/.config/waybar/config.jsonc — clock, battery, network (wifi/ethernet), pulseaudio, cpu, memory, disk. Skip 'backlight' (Mac handles natively). Skip 'tray' for now (no easy SketchyBar equivalent; revisit if needed). Skip 'custom/caffeine' and 'custom/bandwidth' — Linux-specific scripts; revisit later.

Layout: workspace pills stay rightmost on the right side. System widgets sit just to the LEFT of the pills (still on right half of bar). Order proposal (right-to-left from pills): clock, battery, wifi, audio, memory, cpu, disk — frequently-glanced first. Final order TBD on Mac.

Icons: SF Symbols (built-in on macOS, no install). waybar uses Font Awesome 6 unicode points; do NOT port those — they won't render. SketchyBar items support icon.font='SF Pro:Semibold:13.0' and icon as the SF Symbol name or unicode point.

Refresh: per-item via SketchyBar's update_freq (seconds). Suggested: clock 30s, battery 60s, wifi 5s, pulseaudio event-driven (subscribe to volume_change), cpu 5s, memory 10s, disk 60s. No global tick.

Convention: one plugin script per module under packages/macos/sketchybar/.config/sketchybar/plugins/, matching the shape of aerospace_workspaces.sh — bash, set -uo pipefail, defensive against missing CLIs. Keep sketchybarrc declarative (just --add + --set + --subscribe).

Palette: reuse the constants already defined in sketchybarrc (COLOR_BG, COLOR_FG, COLOR_ACTIVE) — extend if needed (waybar has warn/crit thresholds for cpu/memory/battery; mirror those colors).

Out of scope (post-post-MVP): click handlers, animations, tooltips, per-app icons, MDM detection.
